ground_truth:
CHEST RADIOGRAPH REPORT

Examination: PA and Lateral chest radiograph
Date: 11/01/2024
Patient: Thomas Anderson  DOB: 30/05/1980  MRN: 553412

Technique: PA and lateral views obtained.

Findings:

PA View:
- Heart size is normal (CTR < 50%)
- Mediastinal silhouette is unremarkable
- No pleural effusion
- No pneumothorax
- Lungs are clear bilaterally without focal consolidation, mass, or pleural abnormality
- No hilar lymphadenopathy
- Visualized osseous structures are intact without acute fracture
- No acute osseous abnormality

Lateral View:
- Clear retrosternal and retrocardiac spaces
- No consolidation in the lower lobes
- Hemidiaphragms are clear

Impression:
No acute cardiopulmonary abnormality.
Normal chest radiograph.

Comparison: None available.

Dr. James Wilson, MD
Radiology Department
Board Certified Diagnostic Radiology
